SIDEBAR.SETUP_DESC: Almost there to complete your store

DASHBOARD.TITLE: Vendor operations hub
DASHBOARD.SUBTITLE: A quick look at sales, pending orders, and the actions that need attention right now.
DASHBOARD.PENDING_ORDERS_NOTE: 8 orders need confirmation within one hour
DASHBOARD.ADD_PRODUCTS_DESC: Upload product images and prepare pricing before admin review.
DASHBOARD.TRACK_SHIPMENTS_DESC: Review today's outgoing orders and flag delayed shipments.
DASHBOARD.ADJUST_HOURS_DESC: Update delivery windows and blackout dates before evening traffic.

CHECKLIST.CONFIRM_ORDERS_BODY: Review newly created orders before prep windows slip.
CHECKLIST.LOW_STOCK_BODY: 4 products are nearly out of stock and need an update.

LOGIN.HERO_DESC: Discover advanced analytics tools, smart inventory management, and faster access to your customers through Zadana's upgraded dashboard.
LOGIN.SUBTITLE: Smart Trade Management System
LOGIN.DESCRIPTION: Manage your products, track your orders, and analyze your sales performance through a single platform specifically designed for your business growth.

FORGOT_PASSWORD_PAGE.HERO_DESC: We will help you securely regain access to your store so you can resume your business operations.
FORGOT_PASSWORD_PAGE.CARD_DESC: Enter your registered email and we'll send you a secure link to reset your password.

REGISTER.HERO_DESC: Join thousands of stores who trust Zadana. Register your account now and start selling for faster reach and higher profits.

ONBOARDING.PREPARING: The vendor profile is almost ready. We only need the final verified details.
ONBOARDING.TITLE: Complete Store Setup
ONBOARDING.SUBTITLE: This flow mirrors the vendor details structure from the super admin panel so review and onboarding stay aligned.
ONBOARDING.FORM_INTRO_TITLE: The same core fields used in the vendor details profile
ONBOARDING.FORM_INTRO_TEXT: Each step maps directly to a section in the vendor profile: store data, location, legal data, banking, then final documents.

STEP_DESCRIPTIONS.BASIC: Start with store identity, activity, and direct owner contact details.
STEP_DESCRIPTIONS.LOCATION: Add the headquarters location and national address exactly as it should appear in the profile.
STEP_DESCRIPTIONS.LEGAL: Review the CR, owner ID, and tax data so the Legal Data section stays complete.
STEP_DESCRIPTIONS.FINANCE: Complete banking and settlement details using the same banking structure used in review.
STEP_DESCRIPTIONS.DOCS: Upload the logo and commercial registration to close the file and send it for final review.

PLACEHOLDERS.NAT_ADDRESS: e.g. 7293 King Fahd Rd, Al Malqa, Riyadh 13524

ONBOARDING.UPLOAD_LOGO_HELP: Used across the store profile and vendor identity inside the platform.
ONBOARDING.UPLOAD_CR_HELP: Required for final review and verification against the legal section.
ONBOARDING.CHECKLIST_SUBTITLE: Make sure every required file is ready before submitting

SUCCESS_PAGE.TITLE: Application Submitted Successfully!
SUCCESS_PAGE.DESCRIPTION: Thank you for your interest in joining Zadana. Your application is now being reviewed by our dedicated team. We will get back to you via email within the next 24-48 hours.
SUCCESS_PAGE.PENDING_HINT: Full store capabilities will be unlocked once your application is approved.

PRODUCTS.LIST_SUBTITLE: Manage your store products, pricing, and inventory in one place.
PRODUCTS.SEARCH_PLACEHOLDER: Search by product ID or name...
PRODUCTS.EMPTY_DESC: Start by adding your first product from the Global Product Bank.
PRODUCTS.BANK_SUBTITLE: Browse and add products from Zadana's unified catalog directly to your store.
